name: Mediterra S.A.
summary: Mediterra S.A. engages in retail business activities in Greece and internationally. The company's stores offer traditional products, such as loukoums, taffy sweets, fruit preserves in syrup, cookies, candies, and traditional sweets; snacks and chocolates; Mastiha chewing gums and breakfast products; grocery, including cereals, pasta products, dips, jams, spreads, olives and olive oil products, salty flavors, and salads; Mastiha liqueur and wines; cosmetics, parapharmaceutical products, and publications and gifts; and organic products. It operates 16 stores under the mastihashop brand. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Chios, Greece. Mediterra S.A. is a subsidiary of Chios Mastiha Growers Association.
